mapper.update: UPDATE wms_warehouse SET warehouse_code = #{entity.warehouseCode}, warehouse_name = #{entity.warehouseName}, warehouse_type = #{entity.warehouseType}, capacity = #{entity.capacity}, capacity_unit = #{entity.capacityUnit}, address = #{entity.address}, manager_name = #{entity.managerName}, manager_phone = #{entity.managerPhone}, status = #{entity.status}, remark = #{entity.remark}, temperature_min = #{entity.temperatureMin}, temperature_max = #{entity.temperatureMax}, humidity_min = #{entity.humidityMin}, humidity_max = #{entity.humidityMax}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{entity.id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted = 0
